## Checklist
- [ ] Linked issue/task
- [ ] Tests added or updated (if applicable)
- [ ] `ruff check src tests` passes locally
- [ ] `pytest tests` passes locally
- [ ] Docs/README updated (if behavior changed)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials introduced
